subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Praise be to God that thou didst fulfill that which was enjoined upon thee, hastening to Yazd and conducting those captives to Tehran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان الحمد لله آنچه مامور گشتی مجری داشتی بیزد شتافتی و آن اسرا را بطهران
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @law of inheritance, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
